docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ORELLANA, SANTOS AS TO DEFENDANT PORRAS, RAFAEL DBA RAFAEL'S TAILORING JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
